# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    A = list(map(int, data[1:]))

    prefix_xor = [0] * (N + 1)
    for i in range(N):
        prefix_xor[i + 1] = prefix_xor[i] ^ A[i]

    result = 0
    for i in range(1, N + 1):
        for j in range(i + 1, N + 1):
            xor_val = prefix_xor[j] ^ prefix_xor[i - 1]
            result += xor_val

    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
